value.name: Diner at Living Room
value.description: Setup lights, increase temperature, turn on AV receiver, set input & volume

value.name: Morning
value.description: Open the shutters, increase temperature setpoints, turn on Kitchen lights & speaker

value.name: Night
value.description: Close the shutters, turn off lights, lower temperature setpoints

value.name: TV at Living Room
value.description: Setup lights, increase temperature, turn on AV receiver, set input & volume

value.name: Work at Office
value.description: Turn on desk light, increase temperature, turn on speaker

configuration.script:
val open_windows = gWindows.members.filter[item | item.state == OPEN]
postUpdate("ScriptDemo", "Hello from the Rule DSL! Open windows: " + open_windows.size())

def open_windows = ir.getItem("gWindows").members.findAll{item -> item.state === OPEN}
events.postUpdate("ScriptDemo", "Hello from Groovy! Open windows: " + open_windows.size())

var openWindows = items.getItem('gWindows').members.filter(m => m.state === 'OPEN').length
items.getItem('ScriptDemo').postUpdate(`Hello from JavaScript! Open windows: ${openWindows}`)

openWindows = len(list(filter(lambda x: x.getState() == scope.OPEN, Registry.getItem('gWindows').getMembers())))
Registry.getItem('ScriptDemo').postUpdate(f"Hello from Python! Open windows: {openWindows}")

open_windows = gWindows.members.select { |item| item.state == 'OPEN' }
ScriptDemo.command 'Hello from Ruby! Open windows: ' + open_windows.length.to_s
